title: Rats Pack
description: this project was created for minecraft 1.21.1 neoforge. The mod adds new food and its crafting, as well as the rats themselves
body: This mod was created as an attempt to replace **"Rats"**. Everything that is currently being added gradually, so you can follow the updates in the telegram channel. Please, tell me if you find errors in mod. The mod adds some food and rats, install the mod to **explore it**
